channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pulisic scores direct from corner kick for AC Milan. Then admits it was an accident
item.description: MILAN (AP) — Christian Pulisic scored direct from a corner kick to set AC Milan on the way to its first victory in this season's Champions League. But the United States international admitted it was an accident.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers WR Deebo Samuel gets released from the hospital, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Deebo Samuel has been released from the hospital after being treated for a bout of pneumonia.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark calls out WNBA for schedule amid offer from rival league and possible player lockout
item.description: During a video interview that involved WNBA legend Sue Bird, Clark was seen complaining about the WNBA schedule taking place in the summer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Diana Taurasi still mulling over decision to retire or play another year
item.description: Diana Taurasi is still mulling over her decision whether to play another season in the WNBA or retire. The 20-year veteran and future Hall of Famer told The Associated Press on Tuesday that she’s going to take her time on deciding what she wants to do. “I don’t take retirement lightly.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Messi Mania helps drive record growth for MLS
item.description: Boosted by the Messi Effect, Major League Soccer hit record attendance marks and saw expanded sponsorship revenue this season. With the conclusion of the regular season, MLS on Tuesday reported a 5% increase in attendance over last year with a league-wide total of 11.45 million.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Murray runs for a TD, leads Cardinals to game-winning FG and 17-15 win over Chargers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Arizona's Kyler Murray rolled out to his left before turning on the jets, beating a Chargers defender to the sideline and then coasting for a spectacular 44-yard touchdown, casually holding the ball with one hand like it was a backyard game.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Gordon agrees to a four-year, $133 million extension with the Denver Nuggets
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The Denver Nuggets secured another one of their core players by agreeing with forward Aaron Gordon on a four-year, $133 million contract extension Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens fan seen in viral fight video turns himself into police, faces multiple assault charges
item.description: John Callis, a 24-year-old Baltimore Ravens fan, turned himself into Baltimore police on Monday in connection to assault of three victims, including two Washington Commanders fans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders quarterback Aidan O'Connell out for next 4-6 weeks after fracturing thumb: reports
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders quarterback Aidan O'Connell fractured his thumb during the Raiders' 20-15 loss to the L.A. Rams on Sunday and will reportedly be out for four to six weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers WR Brandon Aiyuk to miss season with knee injury
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the remainder of the 2024 season after suffering a knee injury in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday. Head coach Kyle Shanahan reported that he tore the MCL and ACL in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patriots head coach Jerod Mayo calls team 'soft' amid six-game losing streak
item.description: New England Patriots head coach Jerod Mayo called his team "soft" following their sixth consecutive defeat, against the Jacksonville Jaguars in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Browns QB Watson suffers likely season-ending Achilles injury. Teammates upset some fans cheered
item.description: Deshaun Watson's tumultuous tenure with Cleveland has taken another significant turn. His third season appears to be over.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: South Florida Athletics named a 'Best College Athletic Department' by Front Office Sports
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - University of South Florida Athletics has been named one of Front Office Sports’ “Best College Athletic Departments” for 2024.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Grand Junction's Luis Mendez is a goal machine
item.description: Through 11 games this season, Grand Junction has scored 37 goals. Luis Mendez has 28 of them. 28 goals in 11 games.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Calgary to end season-opening road trip, host Sharks in home opener Thursday
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will finally play on their home ice after a four-game Western Conference road trip to open the 2024-25 season. It was a trip with mixed results.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
